title: Crystal Threads
description: Modpack that I spun up for personal use. Still in testing phase.
body:
# Description A modpack that use magic for armor, Tinker's Construct for weapon, and Create for Automation. With the focus on integration between the core mods, this would be the direction of improvement for the modpack. # Core mods **Magic** - Blood magic - Ars Nouveau **Technology**: - Create - Applied Energistics 2 **Weapon**: - Tinkers Construct **Terain Generation & Mobs**: - Terralith - Alex's Mob - Alex's Cave # Optional mods **Terain Generation & Mobs**: - Nullscape - Incendium - Dungeon & Taverns - YUNG's ... # Current modpack compatibility | |Blood magic|Ars Nouveau|Create|Applied Energistics 2|Tinkers Construct|Terralith|Alex's Mob|Alex's Cave| |---------------------|-----------|-----------|------|---------------------|-----------------|---------|----------|-----------| |Blood magic |✅ |✅ | | | | | | | |Ars Nouveau |✅ |✅ | | | | | | | |Create | | |✅ | | | | | | |Applied Energistics 2| | | |✅ | | | | | |Tinkers Construct | | | | |✅ | | | | |Terralith | | | | | |✅ | | | |Alex's Mob | | | | | | |✅ | | |Alex's Cave | | | | | | | |✅ | # Mod list
